scripts.build:all: npm run build:api && npm run build:mobile
scripts.db:init: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content 'services/api-java/src/main/resources/schema.sql' -Raw | docker exec -i tripin-postgres psql -U tripin -d tripin"
scripts.mobile:prebuild:android: npm --workspace apps/mobile exec -- expo prebuild --platform android --no-install
scripts.mobile:config: npm --workspace apps/mobile exec -- expo config --type prebuild
